title: Rich Velvety Irish Shrimp Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Irish stew featuring shrimp, mustard, and unique ingredients like shrimp paste and nuka pickle, all in a rich and velvety broth. This dish is perfect for a cold winter's night and can be prepared ahead of time for a convenient meal.
instructions: In a large pot, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic in a little bit of oil until they are softened.
Add the shrimp paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped nuka pickle and cook for another minute, stirring occasionally.
Add the shrimp and cook until they are pink and just cooked through.
Add the mustard, chicken broth, and heavy cream, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the peeled and cubed potatoes and sliced carrots, and continue to simmer until they are tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
